name: TS_Pelagos_CF
title: Planet Pelagos - Community Fork
author: Talandar & TriggeredSnake
description:
Visit Pelagos: an insular planet rich in tropical coconut palms, methane deposits, and minor lifeforms. Harvest coconuts, process them into oil, sealant, and biofuels, experiment with fermentation, and use high-temperature calciners to improve smelting processes in your factory.

This version is a fork of Pelagos 0.55.1, the last version available before Talandar switched the license from GPLv3 to CC BY-NC-ND 4.0. The main differences in this fork so far are removing Talandar's lua script to stop your game loading if you modify cargo ship recipes, and changing dependencies to allow you to use an older version of Barrelling Machines without a lua script to prevent the game loading if you change the behavior of the machines.

My goal is to make this fork a community driven alternative to the official mod that can make changes Talandar disagrees with and allows the community to play the game how they want to, rather than how Talander wants them to.

Pelagos - Community Fork is licensed under GPLv3, however music and sounds are licensed under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0.
